privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for blenderbim_env building_energy_model_preparation task. Verified that the data is the real FZK-Haus sample model (fzk_haus.ifc) downloaded from ifcwiki.org. Confirmed the expected target output path, required Pset_SpaceThermalDesign property set, and required space minimum count explicitly match the task instructions and export_result.sh logic. Discovered two critical flaws: 1) The original model already contains 81 IfcRelSpaceBoundary elements, meaning the 20 minimum boundaries requirement is trivially satisfied before any agent action; 2) The task is completely defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task unscorable.
